Registration Process

An Autonomous Body Registered Under Govt. Of West Bengal based On TR Act.1882 Govt. Of India. Inspired by National Task Force on IT & Skill Development.

2,000+ Registered Students

Empowering Your Future through IT & Skill Development

"Registered Under: Niti Aayog, C.R. Act. Ministry of HRD & N.C.T. New Delhi Govt. of India."

Want a good job? Want self identity and also want a well satisfied and well established life? Then we are bringing to you an efficient path to find your success.

Practical Lab

Modern facilities for IT and Skill development.

Right Path

Thousands of paths, one right decision.
